category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Subversion-like utility for Jackrabbit FileVault; official Apache FileVault page describes JCR repository to filesystem mapping and the VLT CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vault-cli; official Apache Jackrabbit FileVault docs identify the Vault Command Line Interface aka vlt.
docs_sources: Official Apache Jackrabbit FileVault site provides overview, VLT Console Tool usage, and API docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Apache FileVault Source Code Management page links the browsable GitHub repository and anonymous gitbox clone for jackrabbit-filevault.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists vlt; source_facts.homepage and official Apache docs describe FileVault, JCR mapping, content packages, and VLT CLI usage.
